title: hieracium subnaevosum
intro: Hieracium subnaevosum, also known as spotted hawkweed or mountain hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hieracium subnaevosum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
